template_data.headline_html: The cert opens the door. You still have to walk through it.

items.title: NAICS alignment in SAM.gov
items.sub: Wrong codes = invisible to buyers, cert or not

items.title: Pair cert with a GSA Schedule
items.sub: eBuy set-asides require a Schedule holder — no Schedule, no RFQ

items.title: Rewrite your capability statement
items.sub: Show what you deliver, not just which box you check

items.title: Filter SAM.gov by set-aside weekly
items.sub: Your cert unlocks a column of opportunities most people ignore

items.title: Pursue teaming proactively
items.sub: Primes need certified subs — position yourself before they come looking

template_data.image_headline: CERTIFIED. NOW THE REAL WORK STARTS.
template_data.image_prompt: Infographic checklist layout. Bold headline top: 'CERTIFIED. NOW THE REAL WORK STARTS.' with key icon in coral. Left side: illustrated professional woman in blazer standing at an open doorway, confident posture, dark navy background. Right side: white panel with 5 checklist rows, each with a green checkmark and a short 2-3 word label: 'RIGHT NAICS', 'GSA SCHEDULE', 'CAPABILITY STATEMENT', 'WEEKLY SAM SEARCH', 'TEAMING READY'. Bottom: dark navy banner with short callout 'THE CERT IS JUST THE KEY'. Footer text: 'Josh Ladick · GSA Focus'.
